requirement_topic.en: PUC Grid Connection — 240/415 V 50 Hz Island Network
requirement_topic.zh: PUC并网接入——240/415 V 50 Hz岛屿电网
requirement_topic.zht: PUC併網接入——240/415 V 50 Hz島嶼電網

summary.en: Seychelles electricity supply is operated by the Public Utilities Corporation (PUC), with sector oversight by the Seychelles Energy Commission (SEC). The low-voltage context is 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring PUC supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: 塞舌尔电力供应由Public Utilities Corporation（PUC）运营，并由Seychelles Energy Commission（SEC）监管。低压电网环境为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成PUC供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。
summary.zht: 塞席爾電力供應由Public Utilities Corporation（PUC）運營，並由Seychelles Energy Commission（SEC）監管。低壓電網環境為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成PUC供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。

standards_or_laws: Public Utilities Corporation (PUC) electricity network connection and project acceptance
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Seychelles 240/415 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：塞舌尔240/415 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：塞席爾240/415 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for PUC review. For small island grids and resort or solar-linked sites, load management and demand limits should be agreed with PUC before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按PUC审查准备。对于小型岛屿电网、度假村或与太阳能相关的场址，应在出货前与PUC确认负载管理和需量限制。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按PUC審查準備。對於小型島嶼電網、度假村或與太陽能相關的場址，應在出貨前與PUC確認負載管理和需量限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require PUC project review and acceptance; voltage is 240/415 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a PUC approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Seychelles 240/415 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Seychelles-ready EVSE needs PUC project acceptance and explicit 240/415 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向塞舌尔的EVSE需要PUC项目验收，并明确验证240/415 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向塞席爾的EVSE需要PUC項目驗收，並明確驗證240/415 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。
